name: Bimprisoned Researcher
description:
Cursed by evil magic, this studious and brilliant researcher has found her mind trapped inside the jiggly body of a stereotypical bimbo! Forced to sway and giggle against her will, this poor girl is in a constant battle with her body's naughtier urges in order to prove her genius. So don't let her ditzy expression and bouncing boobs fool you. Behind that vapid shell is a keen mind with an ego almost has big as her ass! She constantly fights to keep her mind from sliding into the pink abyss.

Bimprisoned Researcher, buxom beauty, kinda sexy
creator: redneckdemon
